note: Supplementary permutation-sensitivity appendix. Does NOT modify phase_07_core.pkl or results_lock.json. Shares the exact seed (SEED + 101) as the locked Phase-7 run so N=500 extends the same permutation sequence as N=200. If hits_ge_observed stays 0 as N grows, the reportable statement is 'p < 1/(N+1)'; we cannot infer a sharper value.
